summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MNC 2025 platform - both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional. All authentication flows, admin modules, and brand portal features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Status filter dropdown has minor click interception issue but functionality works

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with hero section
JWT login works for admin@mnc.pt / Admin123!
JWT login works for marca@test.pt / Marca123!
Admin Dashboard shows stats and charts correctly
All 7 admin modules navigation working (Candidaturas, Marcas Aprovadas, Logística, Comunicação, Sustentabilidade, Social Media, Patrocinadores)
Admin Candidaturas page - list, filter, search functionality
Brand Portal loads and shows user candidaturas
Brand Portal - new candidatura form modal opens and works
AI analysis integration working (visible in candidaturas)
Backend API - 22/22 tests passed (100% success rate)
All CRUD operations for admin modules working
Candidatura creation and AI analysis working
